channel.title: File Suite
channel.description: Private browser-first developer utilities for JSON, JWT, code, files, and secure local workflows.

item.title: File Suite dashboard
item.description: Search browser-only developer utilities with usage counts, emoji reactions, and private-tool positioning.

item.title: Cookie consent for optional Clarity analytics
item.description: Microsoft Clarity loads only after cookie consent. Tool files, input, and output are not sent to analytics.

item.title: Neon, Clerk, and Zoho integrations
item.description: Optional account-backed comments, emoji reactions, helpful votes, usage counts, and Zoho-powered enquiry email are now wired.

item.title: SQL Online Compiler
item.description: Run SQLite queries locally with sql.js and SQLite WASM loaded from File Suite static assets.

item.title: Merge PDFs
item.description: Merge PDF files locally with QPDF WASM in a Web Worker. PDF file picking supports .pdf and application/pdf.

item.title: JSON Formatter
item.description: Format, validate, and inspect JSON locally in the browser.

item.title: Python Online Compiler
item.description: Run Python snippets locally with browser-loaded Pyodide assets.
